ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ceramic material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the ceramic material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the material was created */,
  "al" REAL /* Percentage of aluminum in the material */,
  "si" REAL /* Percentage of silicon in the material */,
  "fe" REAL /* Percentage of iron in the material */,
  "ca" REAL /* Percentage of calcium in the material */,
  "mg" REAL /* Percentage of magnesium in the material */,
  "ti" REAL /* Percentage of titanium in the material */,
  "k" REAL /* Percentage of potassium in the material */,
  "p" REAL /* Percentage of phosphorus in the material */,
  "mn" REAL /* Percentage of manganese in the material */,
  "sr" REAL /* Percentage of strontium in the material */,
  "na" REAL /* Percentage of sodium in the material */,
  "rb" REAL /* Percentage of rubidium in the material */,
  "zr" REAL /* Percentage of zirconium in the material */,
  "zn" REAL /* Percentage of zinc in the material */,
  "v" REAL /* Percentage of vanadium in the material */,
  "s" REAL /* Percentage of sulfur in the material */,
  "ba" REAL /* Percentage of barium in the material */,
  "cr" REAL /* Percentage of chromium in the material */,
  "y" REAL /* Percentage of yttrium in the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES material_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier FOREIGN KEY ("supplier") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material version */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the material */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_versions_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material composition */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material version */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical element */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the element in the material */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance of the element's percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_compositions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES material_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_compositions_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being noted */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_notes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
